/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Lab4.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Lab4.dir/Lab4_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab4.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab4.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o -o Lab4  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
